zh.lifeSummary: 當Mabel de Chester於1172年出生在英國爾切斯特時，她的父親Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester26歲，母親Bertrade de Montfort17歲。她與William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny在英國英格蘭爾切斯特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1233年1月6日在英國坎布利其爾薩福崔享年61歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mabel de Chester于1172年出生在英国爾切斯特时，她的父亲Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester26岁，母亲Bertrade de Montfort17岁。她与William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny在英国英格兰爾切斯特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1233年1月6日在英国坎布利其爾薩福崔享年61岁，埋葬在英国英格兰亨廷格多史爾亨廷格頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Chester
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Chester, the county seat of Cheshire, or from any of various smaller places called with this word (as for example Little Chester in Derbyshire, Chester le Street in County Durham, or Chesters in Northumberland), which is from Old English ceaster ‘Roman fort or walled city’ (from Latin castra ‘legionary camp’).

variants.name: Cheshire
meanings: English: habitational name for someone from the county of Cheshire in northwestern England, the name of which is early recorded as Cestrescire, from the name of the county seat, Chester , + Old English scīr ‘district, division’.

variants.name: Chesterman
meanings: English: possibly a topographic name for someone who lived by a Roman fort, Old English ceaster, or a habitational name for someone from any of the places mentioned at Chester .

nameMeanings.name: Mabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a nickname from the Old French vocabulary word amabel, amable ‘lovely’ (akin to modern English amiable ‘friendly, good-humoured’). The initial vowel began to be lost as early as the 12th century (the same woman is referred to as both Mabilia and Amabilia in a document of 1185 ), but a short vowel in the resulting first syllable was standard, giving a rhyme with babble, until the 19th century, when people began to pronounce the name to rhyme with table.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Mabel de Chester was born in 1172, in Chester, Cheshire, England, her father, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, was 26 and her mother, Bertrade de Montfort, was 17. She married William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 6 January 1233, in Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, England, at the age of 61, and was buried in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mabel de Chester est née en 1172, à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Bertrade de Montfort, avait 17 ans. Elle a épousé William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny à Chester, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 6 janvier 1233, à Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Mabel de Chester 1172 in Chester, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester 26 und ihre Mutter Bertrade de Montfort 17. Sie hat in Chester, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 6. Januar 1233 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, England und wurde in Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel de Chester è nata il nel 1172 nel Chester, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Bertrade de Montfort, aveva 17 anni. Lei sposato William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny nel Chester, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 6 gennaio 1233, nel Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, England, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolta a Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Mabel de Chesterが1172年にイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターで生まれた時，父Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chesterは26歳，母Bertrade de Montfortは17歳であった。イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェスターでWilliam V 'the Crusader' d'Aubignyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1233年1月6日にイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアサウトリーで61歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハンティングドンシュアイアハンティングドンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Mabel de Chester(이)가 1172년 영국 체실르 체스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bertrade de Montfort(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체스터에서 William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1233년 1월 6일 영국 캄브리지실르 사w트리에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 헌틴그도실르 헌틴그던에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mabel de Chester nasceu em 1172, em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade de Montfort, tinha 17 anos. Ela casou-se com William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny em Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 6 de janeiro de 1233, em Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mabel de Chester родилась в 1172 г. в местности честир, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade de Montfort, 17. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny в местности честир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 6 января 1233 г. в местности савтри, камбриджешир, Англия в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности хантингдон, хантингдоншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Mabel de Chester nació en 1172, en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Hugh of Cyfeiliog 5th Earl of Chester, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Bertrade de Montfort, tenía 17 años. Se casó con William V 'the Crusader' d'Aubigny en Chester, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 6 de enero de 1233, en Sawtry, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Huntingdon, Huntingdonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
